items.title: OpenAI's newest AI model is 54% more token efficient on agentic coding, Altman tells CNBC
Platner quits Maine Senate race; Democrats set to pick new nominee
items.description: Maine Democrats must now replace Platner with less than four months until the midterm elections.

items.title: World Cup drives Google Search to record queries per second
items.description: The milestone comes amid Lionel Messi and Argentina's popularity.

items.title: Meet SK Hynix, the trillion-dollar South Korean chipmaker debuting on U.S. markets
items.description: Following a more than sevenfold rally in its stock price over the past year, South Korea's SK Hynix is listing on the Nasdaq.

items.title: Goldman Sachs wins $70 billion in asset management deals with Verizon, Lockheed Martin
items.description: Competition in the multitrillion-dollar market for retirement assets is fierce among managers like Goldman Sachs, BlackRock, Russell Investments and Mercer.

items.title: June home sales disappoint as prices reach an all-time high
items.description: Home sales dropped in June month over month as mortgage rates remain stubbornly high. Prices hit an all-time high.

items.title: Ohio is America's Top State for Business in 2026, capping yearslong rise with first No. 1 finish
items.description: Ohio tops CNBC's rankings for the first time in 2026, with the Buckeye State culminating a yearslong climb as the place to do business in America.

items.title: PepsiCo earnings miss estimates as U.S. consumers tighten their budgets
items.description: PepsiCo reported weaker-than-expected quarterly earnings despite strong international demand.

items.title: Meta jumps into AI coding market in effort to chase Anthropic and OpenAI
items.description: Meta is upgrading its Muse Spark artificial intelligence model under the leadership of AI chief Alexandr Wang.

items.title: AstraZeneca stock drops 9% after heart drug trial miss deals rare blow to pharma powerhouse
items.description: A late-stage clinical trial failed to miss its primary endpoint, U.K.'s laregst drugmaker said Thursday.

items.title: Arkansas is America's Most Improved State in 2026 as workers move to Walmart's home for low costs, high quality of life
items.description: Arkansas is the Most Improved State for Business in CNBC's annual Top States rankings, as working-age adults are attracted by low costs and quality of life.

items.title: Hawaii is America's Worst State for Business in 2026, even its legendary quality of life takes a dip
items.description: Hawaii, America's Worst State for Business in 2026, is trying to address one of the few disadvantages it can control: quality if life. It isn’t easy.

items.title: Here's how Trump Account assets may affect your college aid eligibility
items.description: Assets in a Trump Account may affect a student's need-based college aid eligibility, based on how income is reported on the FAFSA.

items.title: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Thursday
items.description: Chip stocks are jumping again, and Pepsi reported a mixed quarter.

items.title: Ukraine’s drone playbook is wreaking havoc in Russia — and upending where NATO wants to invest
items.description: Ukraine’s deep drone strikes on Russian refineries are reshaping the war and pushing NATO toward a $40 billion counter-drone plan.

items.title: America's Top States for Business 2026: See the full rankings and where your state finished
items.description: CNBC's annual study puts all 50 states to the test across 138 metrics and 10 categories of competitiveness. These are America's Top States for Business.

items.title: Trump says Iran called to make a deal after U.S. strikes; adds it's unclear if war is back on
items.description: When asked whether the U.S. and Iran are returning to a full-scale military conflict, Trump responded: "I don't know."

items.title: Clean power comeback? Don't count out renewable energy and this one stock in particular
items.description: Clean power is responsible for roughly 90% of all new electrical capacity being added to the grid, according to the CEO of the American Clean Power Association.

items.title: Levi Strauss beats quarterly expectations, raises guidance and dividend
items.description: Levi Strauss beat quarterly expectations on the top and bottom lines during its fiscal 2026 second quarter.

items.title: What AI companies want for the millions they're spending on elections
items.description: Lawmakers are working on AI legislation — and two major industry PACs are each pushing for their own version of regulation.
